resources.string: Please enter your student ID and password
By logging in you agree to the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy
Log in with your campus account
Token will be stored locally in secure storage for authentication and auto-refresh.
Login will use local mock data
Turning off will use production API
No web address available to load.
System WebView renderer crashed. Please retry or open in browser.
This link is not on the app whitelist
To avoid loading unknown sites in-app, this link will open in browser only.
Only trusted sites load in-app; unknown links open in browser automatically.
Session expired. Please log in again.
No detail link available for this notice
No classes today — take a rest
If your campus card has been reported lost, please visit the administration office to reactivate it before further use.
No borrowing records at this time
Today is %1$s, schedule is set to the current week
Swipe to switch or tap to expand all weeks
Today is %1$s. Tap a class for full details.
The busiest day this week is %1$s
Tap a class card to view location, instructor and weeks
Pick a background image from your device. Settings are saved locally.
No grades found for the current filter
%1$d courses recorded for this academic year
Switch semesters to view GPA and grade details
Tap a course for full details
View GPA and grades by year
Find rooms by campus & time slot
If your campus card is lost, you can freeze spending here to prevent unauthorized use.
After reporting, please visit the campus card center or administration office for follow-up processing.
Report accepted. Please visit a service desk to confirm status and handle follow-up.
Enter the 6-digit card password to submit the report.
Spending will be frozen immediately. Please confirm the card is actually lost.
View version, updates, website and feedback channels.
Compose UI, Material 3, MVVM/UDF, StateFlow, Retrofit, OkHttp, Kotlin Coroutines.
When enabled, the app uses local mock data for debugging and demos.
Restart the app after switching to ensure all network and UI states refresh.
Switched — restart the app to take effect
No available version info from the upgrade API
Checking whether a new update is available.
Enter an amount to start the payment process. You can return here to confirm status after payment.
Campus card info not yet available
Amount must be between 1 and 500 yuan
Enter your password to confirm the top-up
Please complete the Alipay payment. You can return here to confirm status afterwards.
No app detected to handle this payment link
Network environment is not secure. Please switch to a safe network.
Confirm account status, enter amount, then complete payment on the payment page.
Campus notices preserve original wording. This page only reorganizes the summary and body.
This notice does not exist or has been removed from the local list.
After renewing, the library password will be verified and the borrowing list will auto-refresh.
Enter your ticket number, name and verification code to check your scores.
The verification code can be refreshed independently. Filled info is preserved after a failed query.
Refresh the image if the code is hard to read.
Please fill in ticket number, name, and verification code
Results will appear here after the query.
Whether to submit immediately is up to you. Please confirm the evaluations are ready before submitting.
With "Submit Directly" on, the system will finalize submission right after saving.
When off, only saves; when on, saves and submits immediately.
Evaluation saved. You can return later to confirm and submit.
Evaluations usually cannot be modified after submission. Please confirm the content is finalized.
You can save first and submit later, or save and submit in one step.
Only saves the evaluation. You can return later to confirm and submit.
Will submit directly after saving. Please confirm everything is correct.
If the school has not opened evaluation yet, the page will show the reason directly.
This will save the evaluation. You can return later to confirm and submit.
This will save and submit the evaluation immediately. It usually cannot be modified afterwards.
Browse the latest news from the school\'s public website. No academic system login required.
News, system notices and interaction messages — all in one place.
View latest news from the school\'s public website
Find available rooms by campus, room type, weekday, odd/even week and section.
Set criteria to start searching for available rooms
Available rooms matching the current criteria
Enter your name, admission ticket number and ID number to check scores.
Use the official backup portal when the API is unstable.
Fill in the form to query. The backup portal link stays on the page.
Please fill in all query fields
Scores will appear here after the query
Results will be shown below once available.
Frequently used campus queries in one place — electricity bills and directory at your fingertips.
Dorm electricity bills and campus directory — two high-frequency tools, ready to use with no learning curve.
Enter your name, student ID and year to check dorm electricity usage and fees.
Name and student ID are used to locate your dorm electricity info.
Enter name and student ID to check electricity bill
Please enter name and student ID
Please enter a valid student ID (11 digits)
School department contacts organized for quick dialing, texting, or emailing.
Manage account info, binding status and data export.
No export record yet. You can request an export at any time.
Export request submitted. Data is being prepared.
Data is ready. You can download the file now.
Clear local session and return to login
Browse campus secondhand items in a card feed, with category filters, item details and personal item management.
View the full community portal via web
No items for sale at the moment
No items in this group yet
Seller has not shared contact info
Manage items for sale, sold, and unlisted.
This will update the item status immediately and sync to your items list.
Please select at least one photo
Update item info. Photos will remain unchanged for now.
Photos are preview-only. Editing photos is not supported yet.
Sold items can no longer be edited or relisted
Lost and found items in a unified feed, with details, personal records and recovery status management.
View your posted lost and found items
Submit a new lost or found item
View the full community portal via web
Poster has not shared contact info
Manage your posted lost, found and recovered items.
This item will be moved to the Recovered group and removed from the active list.
At least one contact method is required
Please select at least one photo
Update item info. Photos will remain unchanged for now.
Photos are preview-only. Editing photos is not supported yet.
Browse anonymous posts, view comments, like and respond — a stable space for campus whispers.
Audio content can be opened via web
Play directly in-app — no browser redirect needed.
The secret wall is quiet — nothing to browse yet
No comments yet. Be the first to respond.
View all your text and audio posts.
Tap the button below to play audio
Tap to play audio in details
Browse profiles, view details, send a wave, and manage interactions — all in one flow.
No new profiles in this section
View received waves and my posts
A unified interaction center to handle received waves, sent requests, and your published profiles.
No additional info from the sender
Accepted — contact info is now visible
Contact info will be shown after mutual confirmation.
This is your own profile — no need to send a request.
You have both confirmed. Contact info is now visible.
You already sent a request. Please wait for a response.
Published profiles appear in the hall. Interactions are handled in the Interaction Center.
Photo is optional. Only the first one is shown.
Browse profiles, publish and manage interactions
Browse confessions, view details, comment, like and guess names — a stable space for campus sentiments.
Guessable posts let you try guessing the name. Comments and likes sync with the backend.
View all your posted confessions and interactions.
No comments yet. Be the first to leave one.
Post confessions and leave messages here
Browse topics, view details, manage your posts and like interactions in a unified feed.
Topics with photos show image links from the backend. You can open each photo in details.
View all topics you have posted.
No photos attached to this topic
See what everyone on campus is talking about
Post tasks, accept orders, track delivery status — all in one module.
View orders I posted and accepted
Enter pickup, reward and delivery address
No orders to display for this filter
Order accepted. Pickup or delivery is in progress.
Order is waiting for someone to accept. Keep your phone available.
Still in the hall. Full pickup code and contact info are shown after accepting.
Someone accepted your order. You can confirm completion here after receiving.
You accepted this order. Please complete pickup and delivery promptly.
This order is completed. You can review the record.
To protect requester info, full contact details are shown after order acceptance.
After confirming completion, the order will be marked as completed.
View orders you posted and delivery tasks you accepted.
Fill in pickup, delivery and reward details to help others accept quickly.
Please enter a valid delivery fee
Post delivery tasks or accept orders for extra cash
Browse campus photography with category filters, work details, likes, comments, personal gallery and publishing.
Select photos and add title and content
View all your published campus photography.
No photos to display for this work
No comments yet. Be the first to comment.
Please select at least one photo
See campus moments captured by fellow students
Search the catalog, view details and borrowing status — all library tools on one page.
No results found. Try different keywords.
Missing accession number or call number for renewal
Renewal uses the current accession number and call number.
Enter your library password to query borrowing records. Password is verified again for renewals.
Enter your library password to view current borrowing records.
Enter your library password to verify the renewal. The password is only used for this request.
A clear square image is recommended. Both standard and HD avatars will be updated.
You can restore the system default avatar at any time.
This will remove your current uploaded avatar.
Please select an avatar image first
Failed to read avatar image. Please select again.
Region data unavailable. Please try again later.
Check data export status and download when ready.
Submit a new data export request to the server
Available only after file preparation is complete
Manage verification code, area code and phone binding
Bind or unbind the email for notifications
Manage profile visibility, caching and indexing preferences.
Manage what profile info is visible in the community
Allow search engine or platform caching
Allow bot indexing of profile page
View recent login devices, IPs and regions
Failed to send phone verification code
Failed to send email verification code
Send issues, suggestions or experience feedback to the team.
Report issues, suggestions and feedback directly
View version info and manage developer switches
When enabled, uses mock interceptor to return local sample data
Switch between dev / staging / prod for local debugging and canary testing
Non-debug build. Only showing current environment info.
Submit account deletion request and clear local session
After submitting the deletion request, this account will enter the closure process. Please confirm your password and back up personal data beforehand.
Please enter your current login password
Secret wall, confession wall and topics — all in one place for what\'s happening on campus.
Browse recent anonymous moods and responses.
Browse latest messages and interact in details.
See what everyone on campus is discussing.
Browse secret wall, confession wall and topics
Add a title and photos, then publish to the campus topic feed.
Leave an anonymous message or keep your real name for the guessing game.
Please enter who this is for
Text and audio modes are both supported, with optional 24-hour auto-delete.
Failed to obtain server public key
Server did not return payment info
Network error. Please check your connection.
